title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.986 - Receiver in reciprocal state may sue
text:
375.986.  Receiver in reciprocal state may sue. — The domiciliary receiver of an insurer domiciled in a reciprocal state may sue in this state to recover any assets of such insurer to which he may be entitled under the laws of this state.
(L. 1976 H.B. 1479 § 10) 
Effective 6-16-76
